title: The Giants’ Friendship
description: On pages 5–8, the giants’ friendship as usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards.
scene: The Giants’ Friendship. Usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's no doubt about it. Our next destination is...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That island!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Woohoo!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Our second island on Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: We should be careful...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I'm worried about what Ms. All-Sunday said about this island.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Y-Y-You don't think there are monsters here, do you?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Beats me.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But we gotta stock up on some food pretty soon. I wasn't able to restock at all at the last town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But man, just look at this place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's like a land yet to be explored by people. The entire island is a thick jungle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So this is little garden...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can't say I see anything that would deserve such a cute name like that though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just what about this island is little?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And look!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I've never seen any plants like these even in my Encyclo- Pedia!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: KyaAA!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What was that just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Terrified Nami is sooo cute! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't worry, it's just a normal bird.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And even this island,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Is nothing but your average jungle!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A LIZARD...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Supposed research

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Does this sound like your average jungle!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: That sounded like a volcano exploding or something!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grrr...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "A Tiger!?!?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the giants’ friendship. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
